name: OtpInput
description: A one-time password input component that renders multiple single-character input fields. Supports auto-focus navigation, paste handling, keyboard navigation, and validation states.
usage_guidelines: Use for OTP/verification code entry forms.
Set length prop to match expected code length.
Handle value changes via onChange callback.
Use invalid prop to show validation errors.
Supports paste functionality for full code entry.

length.description: Number of input fields to render for the OTP code.

value.description: Current OTP value as a string.

onChange.description: Callback fired when OTP value changes.

disabled.description: Disables all input fields when true.

className.description: Additional CSS classes for the container div.

inputClass.description: Additional CSS classes for individual input fields.

autoFocus.description: Auto-focuses the first input field on mount.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text for each input field.

invalid.description: Shows invalid/error state styling on all inputs.

styling_info.visual_description: A horizontal row of square input fields (58x58px by default) with centered text. Each field accepts a single numeric character. Supports dark mode and invalid state styling.

Do: Set appropriate length for your OTP format
Show invalid state on verification failure
Handle paste events for user convenience
Dont: Don't use for regular text input
Don't set length greater than needed
Don't forget to handle form submission
Don't use without proper validation feedback

Basic.title: Basic

Length.title: Length
